title: Mandatory Returns and Unroutable Publication · Runtime Recall
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs mandatory returns and unroutable publication from producer, broker, queue, delivery, Go runtime, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one protocol or concurrency misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a correlated Go return and route-evidence ledger after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Register and drain return notifications before mandatory publication and correlate content, exchange, routing key, properties, and publisher intent.
Distinguish broker confirms from consumer processing and combine mandatory returns or alternate routing with confirm results; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Build topology fixtures that assert expected destination sets, forbidden routes, unroutable cases, permissions, and changed bindings; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Alternate Return Tradeoff
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go messaging team handles case 7332 during table-driven topology review for a tenant migration. Build deterministic Go evidence to keep return, alternate custody, confirmation, and unknown route evidence separate; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then make one state notification stale after recovery generation changes. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose mandatory returns, alternate exchanges, or both from publisher feedback, broker custody, operational ownership, and observability needs; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Inspect the Alternate Return Tradeoff trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

In Go, publisher confirms and basic.return notifications have one guaranteed combined order.
